title: Bone density result review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

treatment_and_management.text: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact DEXA section supports clinician-led result and correspondence review and a documented plan or follow-up when arranged; it does not independently label osteoporosis or choose treatment.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-reviewed DEXA reporting with age and risk qualifiers and without independently assigning a diagnosis.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

treatment_and_management.text: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Fracture-risk recommendations were reviewed for context; the workflow does not calculate FRAX or infer a risk category.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports detailed risk history, fragility-fracture context, falls risk, FRAX and BMD context, and monitoring of treatment effects.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

medication.text: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.
medication.rationale: The exact DoH risk-factor section supports interval change, functional impact, associated history, relevant negatives, patient concerns, measured weight or BMI and focused assessment in an age- and risk-qualified osteoporosis context.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports documenting falls, low calcium or vitamin D context, low weight, smoking or alcohol, medicine context, personal or family fracture history, and secondary causes.

source.title: DOH Guidelines on Screening for Osteoporosis

source_limitations: DEXA date, site, T-score, Z-score, prior comparison, fracture history, FRAX, diagnosis, treatment, medicine, dose and monitoring interval remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
